name: Molasses Brown Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Grease a 9 X 5 X 3-inch pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, wheat germ, brown sugar, salt, and raisins. Mix well.
4. In a second mixing bowl, mix baking soda, buttermilk, and molasses using a wooden spoon until the mixture starts to bubble.
5. Immediately mix the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients.
6. Spoon the batter into the greased pan.
7. Bake immediately.
8. The bread is done when a toothpick comes out clean, about 1 hour.
9. Turn out of the pan and cool on a wire rack.
10. Makes 1 loaf.
